data.return_price_formula: Return price formula (empty = auto; 'current_price' = same as buy; e.g. 'current_price / 1.21' to strip VAT)

data_description.return_price_formula: Leave empty to use the native return tariff from your sensor (Zonneplan: electricity_price_excl_tax). Set to 'current_price' to use the same price for both buy and sell. Variable available: current_price (EUR/MWh).

data.charge_energy: Charge energy — grid kWh to go from min to max SoC
data.discharge_energy: Discharge energy — grid kWh delivered from max to min SoC

data.zendure_soc_entity: Battery SoC sensor entity (leave blank to skip)

error.formula_invalid: Return price formula is invalid. Use 'current_price' as the variable.
